howItWorks.outro: Vehicle specifications and costs vary by model year and condition. Consult your mechanic for specific advice.

faq.q: How often should I change oil?
faq.a: Every 5,000 miles for conventional, 7,500-10,000 for synthetic under normal conditions.
Yes, full synthetic typically lasts twice as long as conventional oil.

howWeCalculate.intro: This oil change interval calculator uses established formulas and current data to provide accurate estimates.
steps: Enter your specific values into the calculator fields above
